name: Spinach Salad with Strawberries
recipeIngredient: 4 cups baby spinach leaves, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced strawberries on top of the spinach in a salad bowl.
2. Drizzle the vinegar over the salad.
3. Add the olive oil and black pepper.
4. Toss gently to combine.
5. Serve.
